leadText: An Aspear Berry (Japanese: ナナシのみ Nanashi Fruit) is a type of Berry introduced in Generation III. It is the spiritual successor of the Burnt Berry from Generation II, having an identical effect when used on or by a Pokémon.

sections.title: Effect
sections.text: Contents 1 Effect 1.1 Held item 1.2 Bag item 1.3 Ingredient 1.4 Exchange 1.4.1 Generation III 1.4.2 Generation IV 1.4.3 Pokémon Dream World 1.4.4 Generation VIII Effect [ edit | edit source ] Held item [ edit | edit source ] If the holder is frozen , it will consume its Aspear Berry and defrost them. When forcibly consumed via Fling , it also cures the consumer of its freeze. Bag item [ edit | edit source ] When used from the Bag on a Pokémon, it cures that Pokémon of its freeze . This consumes the Aspear Berry. In Pokémon Legends: Arceus , it can be used to cure a frostbitten Pokémon, or thrown near wild Pokémon to draw their attention. Ingredient [ edit | edit source ] Berry Blending R S E When blending with NPCs, Aspear Berries will produce the following Pokéblocks : NPC NPCs' Berries Flavors ( 100 RPM ) Feel 1 NPC Sourness 12 23 2 NPCs Sourness 12 22 3 NPCs Sourness 12 21 Blend Master Sourness 51, Spicy 12 45 OR AS Aspear Berries are yellow Berries that have a very low chance of producing a Pokéblock +. Berry Crush FR LG E Aspear Berries have a base Berry Powder of 20 and a difficulty of 50. With two players, this Berry will contribute 40 units of Berry Powder at 100% silkiness. Poffin Cooking D P Pt BD SP When used alone, Aspear Berries will produce Poffins with Sourness 9 and smoothness 24 when cooked in 1 minute with no spills or burns. Ice Cream Scoop DW Flavor 1 Flavor 2 Flavor 3 Easy to scoop Stickiness Juice Shoppe X Y Aspear Berries are yellow Berries in Group 1. Composting X Y Aspear Berries are yellow Berries. Dye Houses S M US UM 30 Aspear Berries, Iapapa Berries , and Wacan Berries are used to dye any white or dyed clothing into dark yellow. Curry Sw Sh Aspear Berries have a rarity of 1. Cram-o-matic Sw Sh Aspear Berries are Ice-type items and give 2 points towards the output value. Crafting LA An Aspear Berry, Cheri Berry , Pecha Berry , and Rawst Berry are used to craft Full Heal . Exchange [ edit | edit source ] Generation III [ edit | edit source ] In Pokémon Emerald , the player can exchange an Aspear Berry for a Calcium if the Favor Lady asks for 'something roundish' in the Lilycove City Pokémon Center . Generation IV [ edit | edit source ] In Pokémon Platinum , the player can exchange Aspear Berries for accessories at the Pick a Peck of Colors Flower Shop : 1 Aspear Berry for a Yellow Flower Pokémon Dream World [ edit | edit source ] In the Pokémon Dream World , the player could exchange Berries for Décor . The following Décor required Aspear Berries. Catalogue Décor Price Plain Catalogue Spiky Plant 100 Aspear Berries 100 Sitrus Berries Plain Catalogue Log Cabin 150 Aspear Berries 150 Persim Berries 150 Sitrus Berries Plain Catalogue Juice Bar 40 Aspear Berries 10 Grepa Berries Pokémon Doll Catalogue Sudowoodo Doll 50 Aspear Berries Pokémon Doll Catalogue Bonsly Doll 50 Aspear Berries Pokémon Doll Catalogue Blitzle Doll 50 Aspear Berries Generation VIII [ edit | edit source ] In Pokémon Brilliant Diamond and Shining Pearl , the player can exchange Aspear Berries for Stickers at the Pick a Peck of Colors Flower Shop : 3 Aspear Berries for Bubble Sticker D

sections.title: Effect
sections.text: Effect [ edit | edit source ] Ditto can consume Aspear Berries to restore PP , and they can also be gifted to other Pokémon to restore their energy.

sections.title: Description
sections.text: Description [ edit | edit source ] Games Description R S E Colo XD A hold item that defrosts Pok é mon in battle. FR LG When held by a Pok é mon , it will be used in battle for defrosting. D P Pt A Poffin ingredient. It may be used or held by a Pokémon to defrost it. HG SS It may be used or held by a Pokémon to defrost it. B W B2 W2 If held by a Pokémon, it defrosts it. X Y OR AS S M US UM P E Sw Sh BD SP A Berry to be consumed by Pokémon. If a Pokémon holds one, it can recover from being frozen on its own in battle. LA A Berry that can be fed to a Pokémon to cure its frostbite. You can also throw this Berry near wild Pokémon to draw their attention. S V ZA If a Pokémon holds one of these Berries, it will be able to thaw itself after being frozen. Tag information [ edit | edit source ] No. 05 Size: 2.0" (5.0 cm) Firmness: Super hard Games Description R S E The hard Berry is dense with a rich juice. It is quite sour. D P Pt BD SP This Berry's peel is hard, but the flesh inside is very juicy. It is distinguished by its bracing sourness. Curry information [ edit | edit source ] Games Description Sw Sh A Berry that gives off a sour fragrance when you bite it. Using a lot of them adds a light aftertaste to a dish.

sections.title: Description
sections.text: Description [ edit | edit source ] Games Description Pokopia This berry has a distinctively sharp sour taste. Restores some PP when eaten.

Inkay Japan Various Growth [ edit | edit source ] Generation III Planted 0 hours Sprouted 3 hours Taller 6 hours Flowering 9 hours Berries 12 hours An Aspear plant will yield 2-3 Berries. Generation IV Planted 0 hours Sprouted 3 hours Taller 6 hours Flowering 9 hours Berries 12 hours An Aspear plant will yield 2-5 Berries. A growing Aspear plant's soil dries by 15% every hour, fully drying out in 7 hours. Generation V Planted 0 hours Sprouted 4.5 hours Taller 9 hours Flowering 13.5 hours Berries 18 hours An Aspear plant will yield ? Berries. Generation VI Pokémon X and Y Planted 0 hours Sprouted 4 hours Growing 8 hours Bigger 12 hours Budding 16 hours Bloom 20 hours Berries 24 hours An Aspear plant will yield 4-15 Berries. During its growth, watering the plant adds 1 Berries to the final harvest, weeding it adds 1, and removing a pest adds 3. Aspear plants attract Combee as pests. If grown next to each other, a Aspear Berry and a Leppa Berry may mutate into a Hondew Berry . Pokémon Omega Ruby and Alpha Sapphire Planted 0 hours Sprouted 4 hours Taller 8 hours Flowering 12 hours Berries 16 hours An Aspear plant will yield 4-20 Berries. Generation VII Pokémon Sun, Moon, Ultra Sun, and Ultra Moon Planted 0 hours Sprouted 6 hours Taller 12 hours Flowering 20 hours Berries 24 hours An Aspear plant will yield 4 Berries if Isle Aplenny is at Phase 1, 8 Berries if it is at Phase 2, and 12 Berries if it is at Phase 3. Generation VIII Pokémon Brilliant Diamond and Shining Pearl Planted 0 hours Sprouted 3 hours Taller 6 hours Flowering 9 hours Berries 12 hours An Aspear plant will yield 2-5 Berries.
